title: Ka1denz Pvp Optimization Tweaks
description: The ultimate 1.21.11 PvP suite: small culling for FPS, persistent totem counters, and quality-of-life tweaks for competitive play.
body:
# ⚡ Ka1denz PvP Optimizer
**The ultimate performance and utility suite for competitive 1.21.11 PvP.**

Designed specifically for high-intensity environments like **Stray.gg**, **MMC**, and **mcpvp.club**, this mod combines aggressive frame-rate optimizations with essential "Quality of Life" features that every competitive player needs.

---

## 🚀 Key Features

### 🛠️ Performance Optimizations
* **Intelligent Entity Culling:** Drastically improves FPS on servers like **Stray.gg** by culling invisible armor stands and non-essential holograms.
* **Player Distance Culling:** Stops rendering far-away players to save CPU cycles during massive lobby events.
* **Totem Pop Particles Control:** A customizable slider (0-100%) to reduce or entirely remove FPS-killing particles like smoke, hearts, and totem pops.
* **Static Tab List:** Prevents animated Tab headers from causing micro-stutters during intense fights.

### 🛡️ PvP Utility (Addon for uku's Totem Counter)
* **Persistent Totem Counter:** Extends the functionality of uku's Totem Counter to track pops for every player on **Nametags** and your **XP Bar**.
* **Smart Reset Logic:** The counter persists through death but includes a custom **Auto-Reset** feature that triggers when *you* die—perfect for tier testing and practice duels.
* **Sprint Persistence:** Your sprinting state is remembered even after you respawn, so you never have to remember to toggle it back on in the heat of battle.

### 🎨 Clean Visuals
* **Anti-Darken HUD:** Removes the annoying black tint when opening your inventory for better peripheral vision.
* **Recipe Book Remover:** Disables the recipe book button to clean up your GUI and prevent accidental clicks.

---

## 📜 Credits & Dependencies
This mod functions as an all-in-one suite and an enhancement addon. **The following mods are REQUIRED for all features to work:**

* **[ukuLib](https://modrinth.com/mod/ukulib):** Core library required for mod functionality.
* **[uku's Totem Counter](https://modrinth.com/mod/totemcounter):** Required to enable the Totem Tracking and Auto-Reset features.
* **Special thanks to uku** for providing the library and base mod logic that makes these tracking enhancements possible.

---

## ⚙️ Configuration
Fully compatible with **ModMenu** and **Cloth Config**. Press your Mod Menu keybind to access the "PvP Optimizer" page and customize your culling, particles, and utility toggles.

---

### ⚠️ Technical Info
* **Version:** 1.21.11 (Fabric)
* **Environment:** Client-side only. Safe for use on most major PvP networks.
* **Status:** Currently in **BETA**.
